g.text: Static crackles in your helmet speakers for a moment, then fades.
You spot a loose ice crystal on the ground and pocket it.
Arrived at Storm Rift. Food: 98% (-2) | Water: 97% (-3) | Suit: 100%
A narrow canyon with walls so high they block most of the sky. Echoes
No new locations found within scanner range.
No new signatures in range. Try moving to a different location.
